title: Desperate Measures

"'''Desperate Measures'''" is a short story written by [[Carolyn Golledge]] that was originally published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 10|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 10]] in [[May]] [[1996]] by [[West End Games]].

==Plot summary==
[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Medic/Legends|medics]] are not able to find an [[Antidote/Legends|antidote]] for the [[Poison/Legends|toxin]] threatening [[Ketrian Altronel]], a brilliant [[Metallurgist|metallurgist]] who has defected to the Alliance cause. Defying orders, her beloved [[Stevan Makintay|Mak Makintay]] returns to [[Hargeeva]] to kidnap the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] who poisoned her. Mak captures [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Nial Pedrin]], but will not stoop to [[Torture/Legends|torture]] to extract information from him. Pedrin bargains for his freedom in exchange for saving Ketrian's life. In truth, Pedrin does not know how to cure Ketrian, but he bluffs his way along hoping to escape later. At the Rebel base on [[Karatha]], Mak and Pedrin discover the true cause of Ketrian's incapacitation – a rival within the Rebel medical staff has been secretly poisoning her. Pedrin realizes his deception is exposed, so he [[Knife/Legends|stabs]] Mak in a bid to flee, but is captured by Rebels. Mak and Ketrian make a full recovery.
